heading: Costs and expenses a charge on prize property
label: 8870 Costs and expenses a charge on prize property

children.label: a
children.text: Costs and expenses allowed by the court incident to the bringing in, custody, preservation, insurance, and sale or other disposal of prize property are a charge upon the property and shall be paid from the proceeds thereof, unless the court decrees restitution free from such a charge.

children.label: b
children.text: Charges for work and labor, materials furnished, or money paid must be supported by affidavit or vouchers.
